pages.text:
SYNTHETIC CLINICAL NOTE
Ma benh nhan: SYN-001

Ho ten: Nguyen Van Synthetic A
Ngay sinh: 1970-01-15

Gioi tinh: Nam

Tien su benh:
- Tang huyet ap tu nam 2019, dang dieu tri on dinh.
- Dai thao duong type 2 tu nam 2020.

Di ung:

- Di ung Penicillin, phan ung noi man do.

Thuoc dang dung:
- Metformin 500mg, uong 2 lan/ngay.

- Amlodipine 5mg, uong 1 lan/ngay.

Xet nghiem:
Glucose: 9.8 mmol/L, tham chieu 3.9-5.6, cao.

Creatinine: 150 umol/L, tham chieu 60-110, cao.
